zh.lifeSummary: 當Gwenllian Oldcastle於1392年出生在英國武斯特斯爾比爾斯莫頓時，她的父親Sir Thomas Oldcastle28歲，母親Alice Pembridge20歲。她於大約1404年與Sir Robert Whitney II在英國英格蘭賀福爾特尼--也結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1450年在英國英格蘭賀福爾特尼--也享年59歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gwenllian Oldcastle于1392年出生在英国武斯特斯爾比爾斯莫頓时，她的父亲Sir Thomas Oldcastle28岁，母亲Alice Pembridge20岁。她于大约1404年与Sir Robert Whitney II在英国英格兰賀福爾特尼--也结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1450年在英国英格兰賀福爾特尼--也享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: Gwenllian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: from gwen, the feminine form of gwyn ‘white, fair; blessed, holy’ ( see Gwen ) + lliant ‘flood, flow’ (probably in the transferred sense ‘foamy’ or ‘white’, referring to a pale complexion).

en.lifeSummary: When Gwenllian Oldcastle was born in 1392, in Birtsmorton, Worcestershire, England, her father, Sir Thomas Oldcastle, was 28 and her mother, Alice Pembridge, was 20. She married Sir Robert Whitney II about 1404, in Whitney-on-Wye, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died about 1450, in Whitney-on-Wye, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gwenllian Oldcastle est née en 1392, à Birtsmorton, Worcestershire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Oldcastle, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Alice Pembridge, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Robert Whitney II environ 1404, à Whitney-on-Wye, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1450, à Whitney-on-Wye, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gwenllian Oldcastle 1392 in Birtsmorton, Worcestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Thomas Oldcastle 28 und ihre Mutter Alice Pembridge 20. Sie hat um 1404 in Whitney-on-Wye, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom Sir Robert Whitney II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb um 1450 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Whitney-on-Wye, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gwenllian Oldcastle è nata il nel 1392 nel Birtsmorton, Worcestershire, England, sua padre, Sir Thomas Oldcastle, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Alice Pembridge, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Sir Robert Whitney II circa 1404, nel Whitney-on-Wye, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì circa 1450, nel Whitney-on-Wye, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gwenllian Oldcastleが1392年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアバートスモートンで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Oldcastleは28歳，母Alice Pembridgeは20歳であった。約1404年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアウィトニー-オン-ウイでSir Robert Whitney IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1450年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアウィトニー-オン-ウイで59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gwenllian Oldcastle(이)가 1392년 영국 워스스터실르 비르츠모르턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas Oldcastle(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Pembridge(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 대략 1404년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 휘트니--w예에서 Sir Robert Whitney II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1450년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 휘트니--w예에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gwenllian Oldcastle nasceu em 1392, em Birtsmorton, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Oldcastle, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Alice Pembridge, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Robert Whitney II aproximadamente 1404, em Whitney-on-Wye, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1450, em Whitney-on-Wye, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 59 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gwenllian Oldcastle родилась в 1392 г. в местности бирцмортон, ворсестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas Oldcastle было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Pembridge, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Robert Whitney II около 1404 г. в местности уитни-он-ви, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла около 1450 г. в местности уитни-он-ви, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 59 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gwenllian Oldcastle nació en 1392, en Birtsmorton, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas Oldcastle, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Alice Pembridge, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Sir Robert Whitney II aproximadamente 1404, en Whitney-on-Wye, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1450, en Whitney-on-Wye, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 59 años.
